---
title: "Appendix to the Assignment 1"
editor: visual
author: Duc Hoang
date: today
format: 
    html:
      toc: true
      theme: litera
      number-sections: true
    pdf: 
      documentclass: article
      fontsize: 11pt
      geometry:                 
        - top=15mm
        - left=20mm
        - right=15mm
        - bottom=15mm
      number-sections: true
execute:
    echo: false
    warning: false
    message: false
---
While completing the **Assignment 1**, I have utilized AI to help me with my code development, file formating and refining my English literacy.

## Gemini AI prompts:
Here are some AI prompts that I have used in my assignment:

**Prompt 1**: Asking AI how to best render one `.qmd` file into pdf. How to render file leaving out the white space in the beginning or spatious blank space between each part. [Here](https://gemini.google.com/share/c4f5747dd577)

**Prompt 2**: Asking for grammartic application for the whole report. [Here](https://gemini.google.com/share/58a4453c2e2e)

**Prompt 3**: Asking about dataset missing values. I want to make sure how to deal with the missing data in `purchase_amount` variable. [Here](https://gemini.google.com/share/5c76c2b16afb)

**Prompt 4**: Asking how to change letters' color using `markdown`. [Here](https://gemini.google.com/share/12a85959c64b)

**Prompt 5**: Asking how to make one table having `proportion` metric using R code. [Here](https://gemini.google.com/share/f450623e119a)
